description_long: This is a rectangular, dark green metal tin with rounded edges, designed to store and dispense olive oil. The front features a large cream-colored label with the text 'Olio Extra Vergine di Oliva' and an illustration of olive branches with green olives, along with additional gold and black labeling. The top of the tin is metallic with a yellow plastic cap, which serves as the pouring spout. The back of the tin displays a detailed product description and nutritional information in multiple languages, bordered by a red frame and olive branch graphics. The sides are mostly plain green, with some small text and symbols near the bottom. The overall appearance is sturdy and utilitarian, typical for high-quality olive oil packaging found in urban grocery stores or kitchens.
description: A dark green rectangular metal tin for olive oil, featuring a cream label with olive branch graphics and a yellow cap. The tin is sturdy, with detailed product information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main cream label with olive branch illustration, product name, and gold accent label.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain green surface and a glimpse of the yellow cap on top.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the detailed product description, nutritional information, and decorative border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with small white text and symbols near the bottom, and partial view of the front label.
attribute_brand_logo: The front label features a stylized script logo 'di Oliva' with olive branch graphics, located centrally on the cream label. Dominant colors are black, green, and cream.
attribute_flavor_indication: The label indicates 'Olio Extra Vergine di Oliva' with olive branch graphics, suggesting olive oil flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Yes, the back of the tin displays nutritional information and product details in multiple languages.
